title: Note on pulsar timing array correlation functions induced by peculiar velocities
author_string: Neha Anil Kumar, Keisuke Inomata, Marc Kamionkowski
abstract: Several papers have recently calculated the contribution to pulsar timing array overlap reduction functions (ORFs) induced by our peculiar velocity with respect to the rest frame of the stochastic gravitational-wave background. Here we show that a harmonic-space calculation confirms the most recent result. We note that, with the harmonic-space calculation, the ORFs for spin-1 GWs and the correlations with astrometry measurements are also easily obtained.
